headline.title: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5：性能强劲但成本高昂
headline.summary: Anthropic 今日发布 Claude Fable 5，Simon Willison 经过 5.5 小时测试后表示，该模型性能强大但运行缓慢、成本极高，堪称“猛兽”。
headline.summary_en: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 today. After about 5.5 hours of testing, Simon Willison reports the model is powerful but slow and expensive, calling it a "beast".
headline.reason: AI 领域的重磅发布，性能与成本引发行业广泛讨论，且在多类候选新闻中得分最高（20.1）。
headline.reason_en: A major AI release that sparks industry-wide discussion on performance vs. cost, and has the highest score (20.1) among all candidates.
